chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-10 of 2022. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For hearing of main case. 14.02.2022 Mr. Agha Zeb Hussain Pathan, Advocate for the appellant. = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. The private respondent was acquitted by learned 1st Judicial Magistrate, Dokri, vide judgment dated 07.12.2021, which is impugned by the appellant by preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal; it is time barred by 13 days. No application for condoning such delay in preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal is filed. Consequently, the instant criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed being barred by time. JUDG
